notes: Reference NVSim macro topology with 8-bit words and 16x column selection. No assist or device scaling applied.

applied_macro_scaling: IoffScale=0.861 from TT 6-9 ns hold-window energy ratio
notes: NVSim supports leakage scaling through IoffScale, so only macro leakage is adjusted. Latency, energy, and area remain the same topology estimate.
This NVSim build does not model negative bitline assist directly, so the baseline macro is reused and the assist benefit is reported from Cadence bitcell transients.
This NVSim build does not model reduced read wordline swing directly, so the baseline macro is reused and read-stability improvements are reported from Cadence.
